**The stage is set for an exciting matchup between Michigan and Tennessee in the Elite Eight.**
## Context / Background
Michigan and Tennessee are set to face off in the Elite Eight, with both teams looking to secure a spot in the Final Four. The Wolverines have been impressive in the tournament so far, while the Volunteers have shown their strength with a series of dominant performances.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Team | Wins | Losses | Points Per Game |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Michigan | 25 | 8 | 75.6 |
| Tennessee | 28 | 5 | 73.4 |

> The key to Michigan's success will be their ability to contain Tennessee's high-powered offense, while also finding ways to score against a tough Volunteer defense.

## What's Next? (Schedule)
The game is scheduled to take place on a date to be determined, with the winner advancing to the Final Four.
